title: Rocsys unveils hands-free charging system for robotaxis, raises $13M
content:
Rocsys launched the M1, which it calls the world’s first hands-free charging system capable of serving multiple bays in robotaxi depot operations. A single overhead-mounted unit can charge vehicles across up to 10 bays without human intervention.

The Dutch-American company also announced a $13 million Series A extension, bring

title: Rivian is adding 150+ fast chargers at popular LA shopping hubs
content: Rivian is scaling up in Southern California with a big expansion of its Caruso partnership, adding two showrooms and lining up more than 150 fast chargers across some of LA’s busiest retail properties.

title: Tesla Semi hits the port: drayage operator MDB launches 3-week freight pilot
content:
MDB Transportation, a Southern California drayage operator, has launched a three-week pilot running a Tesla Semi on active port freight lanes — marking the second port trucking company to put the electric Class 8 truck to work hauling containers.

title: BYD’s new Song Ultra EV racks up over 60,000 orders in one month, starting at $22,000
content: BYD launched the Song Ultra EV in China, starting at just under $22,000. The new EV is one of the first to be equipped with its Blade Battery and Flash Charging, enabling recharge times in as little as 5 minutes. In just one month, the electric SUV secured over 60,000 orders.

title: Volkswagen opens ID. Polo orders at $40,000, but a more affordable model is coming
content: The new entry-level EV is finally here. Volkswagen opened pre-orders for the ID. Polo on Wednesday, starting at 33,795 euros ($40,000). The promised base version at 25,000 euros ($29,000) will follow shortly.

title: EVs Take 64.9% Share In Sweden – Volvo EX60 Finally Debuts
content:
The first quarter of 2026 saw plugin EVs take 64.9% share in Sweden, up from 58.0% in Q1 2025. BEV share grew strongly year on year (YoY), while PHEV share dipped slightly. Overall Q1 auto volume was 61,960 units, down some 2% YoY. The Volvo EX40 was the best-selling BEV ... [continued]
